name: Vantage Drilling International
description: Vantage Drilling International is an offshore drilling contractor that operates and manages a fleet of modern, high-specification drilling rigs on a worldwide basis. Since its inception in 2007, the company has assembled an experienced global team focused on providing safe, industry-leading drilling operations. In addition to its core drilling services, Vantage provides marketing, operations, and construction management services to other rig-owning companies. The company is committed to its vision of "A Perfect Day Every Day," which emphasizes achieving zero incidents, zero non-productive time, and ensuring complete client satisfaction through trust, integrity, and operational excellence.
